# GoldRush Skills
> 132 copy-paste code skills for building onchain products with the GoldRush API (by Covalent).

GoldRush Skills is a developer resource directory for the GoldRush multichain data API.
Each skill is a focused, production-ready code snippet using the @covalenthq/client-sdk
or @covalenthq/goldrush-kit that solves a specific onchain data problem.

## What is GoldRush?
GoldRush (by Covalent) is a unified blockchain data API supporting 200+ EVM and non-EVM chains.
SDK: @covalenthq/client-sdk
UI Kit: @covalenthq/goldrush-kit
Docs: https://goldrush.dev/docs
API Key: https://goldrush.dev

## Core Services
- BalanceService — token balances, ERC-20 transfers, historical portfolio, NFT holdings
- TransactionService — transaction history, summaries, decoded receipts, block transactions
- NftService — NFT metadata, collection traits, rarity, transfer history, chain collections
- PricingService — historical token prices, spot prices, market cap
- SecurityService — wallet approvals (ERC-20 + NFT), risk scoring
- BaseService — event logs, blocks, chain status, multi-chain activity scan
- AllChainsService — cross-chain wallet discovery, portfolio aggregation

## Supported Chains (sample)
eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, matic-mainnet, arbitrum-mainnet, optimism-mainnet,
bsc-mainnet, avalanche-mainnet, linea-mainnet, scroll-mainnet, zksync-mainnet,
blast-mainnet, mantle-mainnet, fantom-mainnet, gnosis-mainnet, celo-mainnet,
moonbeam-mainnet, zora-mainnet, solana-mainnet, btc-mainnet, aptos-mainnet,
sui-mainnet, cosmos-mainnet, osmosis-mainnet, aurora-mainnet, tron-mainnet,
and 200+ more.

## Skills Reference

Each entry: slug | description | use case | endpoint (first) | cost | complexity

### Wallet (22 skills)

**bitcoin-balance-checker**
  Description: Fetch confirmed UTXOs, current balance, and USD value for any Bitcoin address.
  Use case: Build a Bitcoin balance widget that shows confirmed BTC balance and live USD value for any Bitcoin address — no chainName parameter needed.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/btc-mainnet/address/{walletAddress}/balances/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: bitcoin
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/bitcoin-balance-checker

**bitcoin-hd-wallet-scanner**
  Description: Enumerate all derived addresses and balances from a Bitcoin xpub/ypub/zpub HD wallet key.
  Use case: Scan an entire Bitcoin HD wallet from a single xpub/ypub/zpub key — discover all derived addresses, their balances, and total BTC holdings without exposing private keys.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/btc-mainnet/address/{xpub}/balances_hd/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: bitcoin
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/bitcoin-hd-wallet-scanner

**bitcoin-transaction-explorer**
  Description: Paginated transaction history for any Bitcoin address — inputs, outputs, fees, and confirmation status.
  Use case: Build a Bitcoin transaction explorer that shows the full UTXO history for any address — inputs, outputs, fees, and amounts in BTC and USD.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/btc-mainnet/address/{walletAddress}/transactions/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: bitcoin
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/bitcoin-transaction-explorer

**crypto-tax-exporter**
  Description: Export a complete CSV of all ERC-20 transfers and transactions with USD cost basis for tax reporting — Koinly/CoinTracker compatible.
  Use case: Build a one-click tax report tool that exports every buy, sell, and transfer with USD values at time of transaction for any wallet address.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/transfers_v2/
  Cost: 0.05/item (transfers) + 1/call (prices)
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, gnosis
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/crypto-tax-exporter

**wallet-erc20-transfers**
  Description: Fetch full ERC-20 transfer history for any wallet, optionally filtered by token contract.
  Use case: Build a complete token transfer timeline showing every ERC-20 sent and received with USD amounts — perfect for tax reporting tools and portfolio trackers.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/transfers_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/wallet-erc20-transfers

**historical-portfolio-value**
  Description: 30-day rolling historical portfolio value with open/close/high/low per token per day — build P&L charts, portfolio performance dashboards, and DeFi fund trackers.
  Use case: Build a 30-day portfolio performance chart with per-token OHLC data — show gains, losses, and asset allocation change over time.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/portfolio_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, gnosis
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/historical-portfolio-value

**historical-token-holdings**
  Description: Snapshot of every ERC-20 token balance and USD value at any past date — foundational chains only.
  Use case: Reconstruct a wallet's exact token holdings at any past date — essential for tax calculations, historical P&L reports, and portfolio audits.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/historical_balances/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, gnosis
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/historical-token-holdings

**multi-wallet-aggregator**
  Description: Enter multiple wallet addresses and see combined token balances, total net worth, and unified transaction feed — your whole onchain life in one view.
  Use case: Build a household/team portfolio dashboard that aggregates assets across multiple wallets and shows combined USD net worth, per-wallet breakdown, and top holdings.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/balances_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/wallet/chain
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, arbitrum +2 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/multi-wallet-aggregator

**native-token-balance**
  Description: Lightweight check for the native token balance (ETH, MATIC, BNB, etc.) of any wallet across any chain.
  Use case: Check if a wallet has enough native gas token to cover a transaction before sending — gate app actions by a minimum ETH/MATIC/BNB balance threshold.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/balances_native/
  Cost: 0.1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/native-token-balance

**net-worth-calculator**
  Description: Calculate total wallet net worth across all EVM and non-EVM chains instantly.
  Use case: Show a user their total crypto net worth in USD across every chain they hold assets on — the one-call portfolio summary widget.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/address/{walletAddress}/balances/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/net-worth-calculator

**portfolio-history**
  Description: 30-day historical portfolio value over time — asset-by-asset breakdown per day.
  Use case: Render a stacked area chart of total portfolio value over 30 days — ideal for fund dashboards and DeFi performance trackers.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/portfolio_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, gnosis
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/portfolio-history

**portfolio-performance-report**
  Description: 30-day rolling P&L report with per-token open/high/low/close — build fund-grade performance dashboards for any wallet on foundational chains.
  Use case: Build a hedge fund-style monthly performance report showing each token's 30-day price range, unrealized gain/loss, and portfolio allocation shift.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/portfolio_v2/
  Cost: 2 credits/item
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, gnosis
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/portfolio-performance-report

**portfolio-tracker**
  Description: Monitor multi-chain portfolio value and asset composition in real time.
  Use case: Build a real-time portfolio dashboard that shows every asset a wallet holds with live USD prices and spam tokens filtered out automatically.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/balances_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/portfolio-tracker

**solana-staking-snapshot**
  Description: Query a Solana wallet's complete staking picture: native stake accounts (active, activating, deactivating, inactive) pulled from the on-chain stake program, plus liquid staking positions in mSOL (Marinade), jitoSOL (Jito), bSOL (Sanctum), and stSOL (Lido). Returns stake amount in SOL, activation epoch, estimated APY, and claimable rewards for each position — build a staking dashboard, rewards calculator, or unstaking automation agent in one view.
  Use case: Build a Solana staking dashboard that aggregates native stake accounts and liquid staking positions (mSOL, jitoSOL, bSOL) with estimated APY and claimable rewards in one view.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/balances_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-staking-snapshot

**solana-transaction-history**
  Description: Fetch paginated Solana transaction history via `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{wallet}/transactions_v3/` — each transaction is decoded with the top-level program name (Jupiter, Raydium, System, Token, etc.), SOL fee paid, success/fail status, block time, and a human-readable summary. Paginate with `page` and `page-size` params. Build a complete Solana activity feed or trading journal without ever parsing raw instruction data.
  Use case: Build a decoded Solana transaction activity feed that shows program names, instruction types, fees, and status for any wallet without any raw instruction parsing.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/transactions_v3/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-transaction-history

**solana-wallet-age-activity**
  Description: Use `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{wallet}/transactions_v3/?page-size=1&sort=asc` to find the wallet's first-ever transaction (creation date), then the summary endpoint for total tx count and unique programs interacted with. Returns: first tx date, total lifetime transaction count, top 5 most-called programs, and days since last activity — foundational data for Solana wallet scoring, sybil detection, onchain identity badges, and airdrop eligibility checks.
  Use case: Build a Solana wallet age and activity scorer for sybil detection, airdrop eligibility checks, and onchain identity badges using first transaction date and lifetime interaction data.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/transactions_v3/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-wallet-age-activity

**solana-wallet-balances**
  Description: Call `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{wallet}/balances_v2/` with your GoldRush API key to retrieve every SPL token held — including name, symbol, logo URI, raw balance, decimals, current USD price, and total USD value per token. Handles associated token accounts (ATAs) automatically with no manual derivation. Add `nft=false` to filter out NFTs and return pure fungible token holdings. Build a full Solana portfolio UI in under 50 lines of TypeScript.
  Use case: Build a full Solana portfolio UI that lists every SPL token with its USD value and logo, automatically handling all associated token accounts, in under 50 lines of TypeScript.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/balances_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-wallet-balances

**transaction-history**
  Description: Paginated, decoded transaction history with logs for any wallet or contract address.
  Use case: Build a paginated transaction feed showing decoded event names, ETH value, gas paid, and success status — the core of any wallet explorer or activity page.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/transactions_v3/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/transaction-history

**wallet-activity-feed**
  Description: Stream live wallet events and transaction activity across any supported chain.
  Use case: Add a live activity feed to a wallet dashboard that pushes incoming and outgoing transfers instantly without polling — using the GoldRush streaming WebSocket.
  Endpoint: wss://streaming.goldrushdata.com/graphql — walletTxs subscription
  Cost: Streaming subscription
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +10 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/wallet-activity-feed

**wallet-age-summary**
  Description: Get first and last transaction date, total transaction count, and gas spent for any wallet — the foundation for wallet age verification and on-chain identity.
  Use case: Build a wallet age badge for a DeFi app — show how long a wallet has been active and its total transaction count as a trust and Sybil-resistance signal.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/transactions_summary/
  Cost: 0.1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/wallet-age-summary

**wallet-balances-skill**
  Description: Fetch token balances and portfolio state for any wallet across 100+ chains.
  Use case: Build a multi-chain token portfolio dashboard that shows every asset a wallet holds with live USD prices.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/balances_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/wallet-balances-skill

**wallet-pnl-tracker**
  Description: Unrealized P&L for every token in a wallet — shows entry price, current price, and total gain/loss per position.
  Use case: Build an unrealized P&L dashboard that shows every open token position — entry cost, current value, and total gain/loss in USD — for any wallet in real time.
  Endpoint: wss://streaming.goldrushdata.com/graphql — upnlForWallet query
  Cost: Streaming query
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, arbitrum, optimism
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/wallet-pnl-tracker

### DeFi (9 skills)

**base-memecoin-screener**
  Description: Live feed of new token launches on Base — subscribes to new Aerodrome/Uniswap pairs, shows real-time price candles and momentum for meme coin hunters.
  Use case: Build a Base-specific token launch radar that shows new pairs created in the last 24h with live price candles and initial liquidity — catch early Base memecoins.
  Endpoint: wss://streaming.goldrushdata.com/graphql — newPairs subscription (filtered to base-mainnet)
  Cost: Streaming subscription
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: base
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/base-memecoin-screener

**defi-wallet-dashboard**
  Description: Complete DeFi overview for any wallet — current token positions with USD values, 30-day portfolio performance curve, and recent swap activity in one dashboard.
  Use case: Build a full-featured DeFi portfolio dashboard like Zapper that shows token balances, historical portfolio value chart, and recent DEX trades for any wallet.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/balances_v2/
  Cost: 1 + 2/item + 0.05/item
  Level: Advanced
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, gnosis
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/defi-wallet-dashboard

**dex-trade-history**
  Description: Pull all DEX swap events and volume for any wallet address or token pair.
  Use case: Build a DEX trade history page that shows every swap a wallet made — token in/out, USD value, and which protocol handled the trade.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/transfers_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/dex-trade-history

**jupiter-swap-route-finder**
  Description: Query Jupiter's on-chain routing data indexed by GoldRush to find the best swap path for any SPL token pair — returns the expected output amount, minimum output after slippage tolerance, price impact percentage, and the full multi-hop route through intermediate DEXes (Raydium, Orca, Meteora, Lifinity, etc.). Feed this into an agent's trade execution loop: if price impact exceeds your threshold, hold the position; otherwise use the route data to construct and submit the swap transaction.
  Use case: Build a swap aggregator UI or autonomous trading agent that evaluates the optimal multi-hop route for any SPL token pair and blocks trades when price impact exceeds a threshold.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/transactions_v3/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/jupiter-swap-route-finder

**live-dex-pair-stream**
  Description: Subscribe to new DEX pair creations as they happen across chains — catch launches the moment liquidity is added.
  Use case: Build a real-time new token launch detector that fires instantly when a new DEX pair is created — catch launches before they go viral by subscribing to the newPairs stream.
  Endpoint: wss://streaming.goldrushdata.com/graphql — newPairs subscription
  Cost: Streaming subscription
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, arbitrum, optimism +2 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/live-dex-pair-stream

**raydium-pool-analytics**
  Description: Fetch Raydium AMM and CLMM (Concentrated Liquidity) pool data via GoldRush for any pool address or token pair — returns current TVL in USD, 24h trading volume, real-time fee APY, token0/token1 reserve amounts, and current spot price. Use to compare pools before providing liquidity, track impermanent loss on an existing position by comparing entry vs current reserves, or build a Raydium pool leaderboard sorted by fee APY or volume.
  Use case: Build a Raydium liquidity pool leaderboard that ranks pools by fee APY and 24h trading volume to help liquidity providers identify the best yield opportunities.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/transactions_v3/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/raydium-pool-analytics

**solana-dex-trade-history**
  Description: Decode all swap transactions for any Solana wallet via GoldRush's transaction decoder on `solana-mainnet` — automatically identifies and extracts trades from Jupiter, Raydium, Orca, and Meteora instructions. Each decoded trade returns: input token + amount, output token + amount, USD value at trade time, DEX used, and tx signature. Returns a clean trade-by-trade list with zero raw instruction parsing. Build a full Solana trading journal, PnL calculator, or strategy performance analyzer.
  Use case: Build a Solana trading journal and PnL calculator that automatically extracts all DEX swaps from a wallet's transaction history without any raw instruction parsing.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/transactions_v3/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-dex-trade-history

**solana-yield-dashboard**
  Description: Aggregate current APY/APR data across the top Solana yield venues using GoldRush: Marinade Finance (native staking 6–7% + liquid mSOL), Orca (CLMM fee APY by pool), Kamino (lending supply/borrow rates), Drift (perpetuals funding rates), and Jito (MEV-boosted staking). Returns a unified yield comparison object sortable by APY, protocol, or risk level — use as the data backbone for an autonomous yield-rebalancing agent or a user-facing 'where should I put my SOL?' comparison UI.
  Use case: Build a Solana yield comparison dashboard that ranks staking and DeFi APY opportunities across Marinade, Jito, Orca, and Kamino to power an autonomous yield-rebalancing agent.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/balances_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-yield-dashboard

**token-launch-screener**
  Description: Real-time screener for new DEX token launches — filter by minimum liquidity, chain, and pair token. Build a Dexscreener-style new pairs feed.
  Use case: Build a live token launch feed that surfaces new pairs the moment they are created on any DEX, filtered by minimum liquidity threshold and sorted by chain.
  Endpoint: wss://streaming.goldrushdata.com/graphql — newPairs subscription
  Cost: Streaming subscription
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, arbitrum, optimism +2 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/token-launch-screener

### NFT (14 skills)

**compressed-nft-scanner**
  Description: Fetch all cNFTs (Metaplex Bubblegum / Digital Asset Standard) from any Solana wallet using GoldRush's DAS-compatible NFT endpoint — returns asset ID, Merkle tree address, creator, collection address, and full metadata URI for every compressed NFT. Critical for gaming apps (Aurory, Star Atlas items), DePIN reward programs, and loyalty platforms that mint thousands of cNFTs at ~1/1000th the cost of standard NFTs. One call returns the complete cNFT inventory without running a custom DAS indexer.
  Use case: Build a gaming inventory browser that displays all compressed NFT assets — items, characters, and rewards — held by a player wallet along with their metadata and collection info.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/nfts/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/compressed-nft-scanner

**metaplex-nft-portfolio**
  Description: Call `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{wallet}/nfts/` to return every Metaplex NFT held by a wallet — standard NFTs, pNFTs (programmable NFTs with transfer hooks), and print editions — each with name, image URI, collection address, traits array, and estimated USD floor value derived from recent collection sales. Handles both legacy Token Metadata standard and Token Extensions (Token-2022). Build a complete Solana NFT gallery or valuation dashboard with a single API call.
  Use case: Build a full Solana NFT gallery and valuation dashboard that displays all Metaplex NFTs, pNFTs, and print editions held by a wallet with their traits and estimated USD floor value.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/nfts/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/metaplex-nft-portfolio

**multichain-nft-gallery**
  Description: Discover and display every NFT a wallet holds across all chains in one gallery — scan with getAddressActivity then fetch NFTs per active chain.
  Use case: Build a cross-chain NFT gallery that shows all NFTs a wallet holds on every chain — Ethereum PFPs, Base collections, Polygon gaming assets — in a single responsive grid.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/address/{walletAddress}/activity/
  Cost: 0.5/call (activity) + 1/chain (NFTs)
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +4 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/multichain-nft-gallery

**nft-collection-analytics**
  Description: Holder count, top holders, transfer velocity, and ownership concentration for any ERC-721 collection — build analytics dashboards without a marketplace API.
  Use case: Build an NFT collection insights page showing unique holder count, top 10 whale holders, daily transfer volume, and holder concentration — all from on-chain data.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/tokens/{collectionContract}/token_holders_v2/
  Cost: 0.02/holder + 0.01/event
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, gnosis
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/nft-collection-analytics

**nft-gallery-viewer**
  Description: Drop-in React component that renders a full NFT gallery for any wallet using GoldRush Kit's NFTWalletCollectionView — zero custom UI needed.
  Use case: Add a fully styled NFT gallery to any React/Next.js app in under 10 lines — no custom UI required, just drop in the GoldRush Kit component.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/balances_nft/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/nft-gallery-viewer

**nft-metadata-fetcher**
  Description: Retrieve full NFT metadata, traits, and ownership history for any token onchain.
  Use case: Build an NFT detail page that shows token image, traits, description, and owner for any NFT in a wallet — the foundation for any NFT explorer.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/balances_nft/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/nft-metadata-fetcher

**nft-portfolio-valuation**
  Description: Value an entire NFT portfolio using live collection and market data.
  Use case: Build a wallet NFT portfolio page showing every collection held, total NFT count per collection, and token thumbnails across all supported chains.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/balances_nft/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/nft-portfolio-valuation

**nft-sale-history**
  Description: Full transfer and sale history for a single NFT token ID — who owned it, when it sold, and for how much. Powers provenance viewers and NFT detail pages.
  Use case: Build an NFT provenance page showing every historical owner, transfer timestamp, and inferred sale price from ERC-20 payments — ideal for NFT detail pages and rarity tools.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/balances_nft/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/nft-sale-history

**nft-traits-explorer**
  Description: Fetch all trait types and their value distributions for an NFT collection. Essential for rarity calculators, collection analytics, and trait-based filtering UIs.
  Use case: Build a trait rarity calculator that shows how rare each attribute combination is across a collection — the core of any NFT analytics platform.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/balances_nft/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/nft-traits-explorer

**nft-transfer-monitor**
  Description: Real-time feed of NFT mints, sales, and transfers for any collection — subscribe to ERC-721 Transfer events via the wallet activity stream.
  Use case: Build a live collection activity feed that shows every mint, transfer, and sale for an NFT collection as it happens — like OpenSea's activity tab but in real-time via WebSocket.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/events/topics/{topicHash}/?sender-address={collectionContract}
  Cost: 0.01/event
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, optimism, arbitrum, blast
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/nft-transfer-monitor

**nft-transfer-tracker**
  Description: Monitor NFT mints, transfers, and burns as they happen onchain.
  Use case: Build an NFT transfer notification system that alerts users when NFTs enter or leave their wallet — mint detector, transfer feed, and burn tracker in one.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/transfers_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/nft-transfer-tracker

**nft-gated-app**
  Description: Complete Next.js boilerplate with wallet connect, SIWE authentication, and NFT ownership gating — deploy a token-gated product in under an hour.
  Use case: Ship a token-gated product (Discord alternative, exclusive content site, holder dashboard) where access requires owning any NFT in a specific collection.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/tokens/{collectionContract}/nft_check/{walletAddress}/
  Cost: 1 credit/check
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, arbitrum, optimism, bsc
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/nft-gated-app

**ronin-nft-inventory**
  Description: List all NFTs held in a Ronin wallet — Axie Infinity, Land, and other Sky Mavis NFT collections.
  Use case: Build a Ronin wallet NFT viewer showing all Axie Infinity, Land, and Sky Mavis NFT collections held by any Ronin address — the foundation for Axie portfolio apps.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/axie-mainnet/address/{walletAddress}/balances_nft/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ronin
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/ronin-nft-inventory

**solana-nft-collection-stats**
  Description: Fetch aggregated on-chain stats for any Solana NFT collection by collection address — floor price in SOL and USD, 24h trading volume, total unique holder count, total listed supply, and top 5 holder wallets ranked by number of items. Pair with GoldRush's real-time NFT transfer stream to track when floor listings are scooped. Build a collection monitor that fires an alert when floor drops below your target price, volume spikes above 2x average, or holder concentration increases.
  Use case: Build a Solana NFT collection monitor that tracks floor price, 24h volume, and holder concentration and fires alerts when key thresholds are crossed.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/tokens/{tokenAddress}/token_holders_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-nft-collection-stats

### Analytics (16 skills)

**block-explorer-toolkit**
  Description: Fetch block details, all transactions in a block, and decode individual transactions — all the building blocks for a custom block explorer.
  Use case: Build a custom block explorer that shows block details, gas utilization, and a decoded transaction list — replacing Etherscan for your specific chain or dApp.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/block_v2/{blockHeight}/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/block-explorer-toolkit

**contract-event-dashboard**
  Description: Build a real-time event monitor for any smart contract — poll decoded event logs and display a live activity feed for any protocol or token.
  Use case: Build a live protocol dashboard that shows every decoded event emitted by a smart contract — e.g. Swap, Mint, Transfer, Approval — in a real-time activity feed.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/events/address/{contractAddress}/
  Cost: 0.01/event
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, arbitrum +2 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/contract-event-dashboard

**contract-event-log-monitor**
  Description: Stream all decoded event logs emitted by any smart contract — filter by topic hash, date, or block range. The foundation for DEX analytics, protocol dashboards, and real-time monitoring.
  Use case: Build a protocol activity dashboard that shows every event emitted by a contract — Deposit, Withdraw, Swap — with decoded parameters and timestamps.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/events/address/{contractAddress}/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/contract-event-log-monitor

**cross-contract-event-scanner**
  Description: Scan ALL contracts on a chain for a specific event by topic hash — e.g. find every ERC-20 Transfer or every Uniswap Swap across the entire chain.
  Use case: Find every Uniswap V3 Swap event on Base within the last 1000 blocks — build cross-protocol DEX aggregators, airdrop eligibility scanners, and chain-wide analytics.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/events/topics/{topicHash}/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Advanced
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/cross-contract-event-scanner

  Description: Decode and search contract event logs across any block range and chain.

  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/events/address/{contractAddress}/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/event-log-decoder

  Cost: 0.1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/gas-analytics

  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more

  Use case: Build a copy trading intelligence tool that monitors a curated list of smart money wallets and surfaces new token buys in real-time.
  Endpoint: wss://streaming.goldrushdata.com/graphql — walletTxs subscription
  Cost: Streaming + 1 credit/balance check
  Level: Advanced
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, arbitrum, optimism
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/smart-money-copier

  Description: Track the on-chain growth of any Solana program — DEX, lending protocol, game, or DePIN — using GoldRush's transaction data on `solana-mainnet`. Fetch daily instruction call count, unique signing wallets per day, week-over-week growth rate, and cumulative user count over any 90-day window. Compare two programs head-to-head on the same metrics. Use for investor due diligence on early-stage protocols, health monitoring dashboards, or surfacing underrated programs with breakout growth before they trend.
  Use case: Build a Solana protocol analytics dashboard that tracks daily active users, instruction volume, and week-over-week growth for any program to surface breakout protocols.

  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-program-activity-monitor

Once you have a watchlist, subscribe to their real-time activity stream to receive instant push notifications the moment they buy a new token — before it shows up on Dexscreener. Build a Solana copy-trading radar, alpha group feed, or smart-money signal layer for your trading agent.
  Use case: Build a Solana copy-trading radar that identifies consistently profitable wallets and sends real-time alerts the moment they buy a new token.

  Level: Intermediate

### AI Agents (13 skills)

**agent-counterparty-verification**
  Description: Verify counterparty wallets before agent-initiated transactions using risk signals.
  Use case: Build a pre-transaction risk check for AI agents — before sending tokens, verify the recipient is not a flagged address, has a real transaction history, and has no dangerous approvals.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/approvals/{walletAddress}/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/agent-counterparty-verification

**agent-data-budget-manager**
  Description: Track and optimise GoldRush API credit consumption across AI agent workflows.
  Use case: Build a credit-aware AI agent wrapper that checks chain sync status before issuing queries and tracks cumulative API credit spend across a multi-step workflow.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/chains/status/
  Cost: 0.1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/agent-data-budget-manager

**agent-fleet-monitor**
  Description: Monitor a fleet of AI agent wallets for health, balances, and activity in one view.
  Use case: Build a fleet health dashboard for autonomous agents — monitor gas balances, flag wallets that need refuelling, and surface any unusual on-chain activity across a set of agent addresses.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/balances_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/wallet
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/agent-fleet-monitor

  Description: Give AI agents the ability to read wallet state, balances, and transaction data.
  Use case: Equip a Claude or GPT agent with the ability to answer questions like 'What tokens does this wallet hold?' and 'What did this wallet do recently?' using live on-chain data.

  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more

  Use case: Enable a Claude agent to answer on-chain questions like 'What is the ETH balance of vitalik.eth?' or 'Show me the last 5 transactions for this address' using real GoldRush data.

  Cost: Varies by tool called
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more

  Description: Model Context Protocol server exposing GoldRush APIs to LLMs and AI agents.
  Use case: Connect Claude Desktop or Cursor to GoldRush so the AI can answer on-chain questions directly — no custom code needed, just configure the MCP server and start asking questions.
  Endpoint: MCP tool: get_wallet_balances
  Cost: Varies by tool called
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/goldrush-mcp-server

  Description: Subscribe to live wallet activity events via WebSocket — zero polling, instant updates.
  Use case: Build a live transaction alert system for an AI agent — trigger actions (e.g. notify, rebalance, log) the instant any on-chain activity occurs for a monitored wallet.

  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +10 more

**solana-agent-defi-navigator**
  Description: Pull real-time Jupiter-aggregated route data and Raydium/Orca pool metrics via GoldRush to give an AI agent the swap intelligence it needs: best output amount, price impact, pool liquidity depth, and fee tier — all in one structured call. Feed this into an agent's decision loop to autonomously execute optimal swaps on Solana — if price impact exceeds threshold, hold; otherwise sign and submit.
  Use case: Build an autonomous Solana DeFi agent that evaluates swap routes, checks price impact and pool liquidity, and executes trades only when conditions meet a configurable risk threshold.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/balances_v2/
  Cost: 2 credits/call
  Level: Advanced
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-agent-defi-navigator

**solana-agent-portfolio-snapshot**
  Description: Call GoldRush's `/v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/balances_v2/` to load a complete structured payload of every SPL token, native SOL balance, staking positions, and USD net worth into your agent's context. Use this as the mandatory first step before any Solana agent makes a DeFi decision — gives the agent full portfolio awareness in a single API call.
  Use case: Load a full Solana wallet snapshot — every SPL token, native SOL, staking positions, and total USD net worth — into an AI agent's context before any DeFi decision.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/balances_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-agent-portfolio-snapshot

**solana-agent-risk-gate**
  Description: Before any agent-initiated Solana transaction, run the target token's mint address through GoldRush's token risk endpoint: check for active mint authority (creator can inflate supply), freeze authority (creator can lock your tokens), top-3 holder concentration above 50%, and unverified program interactions. Returns a 0–100 risk score plus per-signal breakdown — wire this as a middleware guard in every agent transaction pipeline to block rug pulls before they execute.
  Use case: Wire a pre-transaction risk gate into every Solana agent pipeline that scores token safety and blocks trades when rug-pull signals like active mint authority or high holder concentration are detected.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/tokens/{tokenAddress}/token_holders_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-agent-risk-gate

**solana-agent-token-launch-detector**
  Description: Stream new SPL token mint events and pump.fun bonding curve graduations in real-time using GoldRush's event monitoring on `solana-mainnet`. When a token graduates (reaches ~$69K market cap and migrates to Raydium), emit a structured event with the mint address, initial Raydium pool address, launch liquidity in SOL, and top-10 early buyers — giving autonomous sniper and launch-monitor agents a clean trigger with full token context to act on immediately.
  Use case: Build an autonomous token launch detector that fires a structured event with full context the moment a pump.fun token graduates to Raydium, enabling sniper agents to act within seconds.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/transactions_v3/
  Cost: 2 credits/call
  Level: Advanced
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-agent-token-launch-detector

**solana-agent-transaction-validator**
  Description: Before an agent signs any Solana transaction, call three GoldRush endpoints in parallel: (1) recipient wallet summary — is this a fresh wallet or known flagged address? (2) token risk score — does the token have active mint/freeze authority? (3) agent wallet balance — is there enough SOL for rent + fees? Combine results into a structured go/no-go payload the agent parses before submitting any instruction to the network.
  Use case: Build a pre-flight transaction validator that runs three parallel GoldRush checks and returns a structured go/no-go decision before an agent submits any Solana transaction.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/balances_v2/
  Cost: 2 credits/call
  Level: Advanced
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-agent-transaction-validator

**solana-agent-wallet-watcher**
  Description: Subscribe to any Solana address via GoldRush's wallet activity stream on `solana-mainnet` and receive push events for every SPL token transfer, program invocation, and stake account change — no polling required. Use the event payload (program name, instruction type, token amounts, counterparty address) to trigger downstream agent actions: execute a hedge, send an alert, update agent memory, or rebalance a portfolio the moment a transaction lands.
  Use case: Build a real-time wallet monitoring agent that triggers automated actions — alerts, hedges, or portfolio rebalancing — the moment a watched Solana address sends or receives tokens.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/transactions_v3/
  Cost: 2 credits/call
  Level: Advanced
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-agent-wallet-watcher

### Developer (15 skills)

**all-chains-status**
  Description: Fetch the real-time sync status of all 200+ GoldRush-supported chains — latest indexed block, sync lag, and chain metadata. Ideal for multi-chain app health checks.
  Use case: Build a chain health dashboard that shows the last indexed block and sync lag for every supported chain — surface stale chains before running queries against them.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/chains/status/
  Cost: 0.1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +14 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/all-chains-status

**anchor-program-data-reader**
  Description: Fetch and decode the on-chain state of any Anchor-based Solana program account via GoldRush — pass a program ID and account address to get fully-typed, human-readable account data with field names and values, using the program's published IDL for deserialization. No custom Borsh deserializer required. Works with any program that has a public IDL: Raydium AMM pools, Drift user accounts, Kamino lending positions, Marinade stake state. Read protocol state directly in your app or agent without a local Anchor client.
  Use case: Build a protocol state inspector that reads and displays decoded Anchor account data for any Solana program without requiring a local Anchor client or custom Borsh deserializer.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/balances_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Advanced
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/anchor-program-data-reader

**api-reference**
  Description: Interactive API explorer and full reference docs for all GoldRush endpoints.
  Use case: Explore every available GoldRush API endpoint in your browser — test calls with your API key, see live responses, and copy ready-to-use SDK code snippets.
  Endpoint: https://goldrush.dev/docs/api/
  Cost: Free to browse
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +14 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/api-reference

**block-date-lookup**
  Description: Convert any date range to block numbers on any EVM chain — essential for historical queries and event log scanning.
  Use case: Find the exact block numbers for a date range before running historical event log queries — convert '2024-01-01' to '2024-01-31' into startingBlock and endingBlock parameters.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/block_v2/{startDate}/{endDate}/
  Cost: 0.1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, arbitrum +2 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/block-date-lookup

  Use case: Build a white-label block explorer page for any EVM chain that lets users search transactions by hash, browse blocks, and see decoded event logs — like a chain-specific Etherscan.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/block_v2/{blockHeight}/
  Cost: 1/block + 0.1/tx
  Level: Advanced
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, arbitrum +6 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/block-explorer-lite

**gas-price-widget**
  Description: Embeddable real-time gas tracker with open/fast/instant tiers and USD fee estimates — drop it into any dApp to show live network conditions.
  Use case: Build a reusable gas price component that shows open/fast/instant gas tiers with estimated USD fees for an ETH transfer and ERC-20 transfer — refreshes every 15 seconds.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/event/gas_prices/?event-type={eventType}
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, arbitrum +2 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/gas-price-widget

  Description: Drop-in React component that shows all active ERC-20 and NFT approvals for a wallet using ApprovalsListView — with built-in revoke functionality.
  Use case: Add a token approval manager to any wallet app — show users all their active approvals with risk scores and let them revoke dangerous ones in one click.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/approvals/{walletAddress}/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/goldrush-kit-approvals

  Description: Drop-in React component for a full token balances table — ERC-20 + native — using GoldRush Kit's TokenBalancesListView. Ships with sorting, USD values, logos, and spam filtering.
  Use case: Add a production-quality token balances table to a wallet app in minutes — no custom UI needed, just drop in the component and pass a wallet address.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/balances_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner

  Description: Drop-in React component rendering a paginated, decoded transaction activity feed for any wallet using WalletActivityListView.
  Use case: Add a paginated transaction activity feed to a wallet app — shows decoded event labels, values, and chain info with zero custom UI code required.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/transactions_v3/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/goldrush-kit-tx-feed

**goldrush-playground**
  Description: Browser-based API playground for testing GoldRush queries without writing code.
  Use case: Prototype API calls and validate responses before writing any code — perfect for exploring new endpoints or debugging unexpected data shapes.
  Endpoint: https://goldrush.dev/platform/
  Cost: Free to use
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +14 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/goldrush-playground

**goldrush-react-hooks**
  Description: Drop-in React hooks for balances, NFTs, and token prices — onchain data made simple.
  Use case: Build React components that fetch on-chain data with a single hook call — handle loading and error states automatically without writing fetch logic yourself.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/balances_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/goldrush-react-hooks

**goldrush-typescript-sdk**
  Description: Official TypeScript SDK with full type safety for every GoldRush API endpoint.
  Use case: Bootstrap any TypeScript or JavaScript project with full on-chain data access in under 5 minutes — install the SDK, paste your API key, and start querying.
  Endpoint: npm: @covalenthq/client-sdk
  Cost: Free to install
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +14 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/goldrush-typescript-sdk

**quickstart-templates**
  Description: Starter templates for building onchain apps with Next.js, Vite, and React.
  Use case: Clone a production-ready Next.js starter that ships with GoldRush Kit components, Tailwind styling, and TypeScript — skip boilerplate and start building your dApp immediately.
  Endpoint: https://github.com/covalenthq/goldrush-kit
  Cost: Free
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/quickstart-templates

**solana-goldrush-quickstart**
  Description: Scaffold a production-ready Solana wallet dashboard in one command using the GoldRush Next.js starter for Solana — pre-wired with `@covalenthq/client-sdk`, Solana wallet adapter (Phantom/Backpack/Solflare), and four ready-to-run components: SPL token balances table with USD values, decoded transaction history feed with program labels, Metaplex NFT gallery, and a wallet age summary card. Clone, add `GOLDRUSH_API_KEY=your_key` to `.env.local`, run `npm dev`, and ship. No blockchain parsing required.
  Use case: Scaffold a production-ready Solana wallet dashboard with token balances, transaction history, NFT gallery, and wallet age summary all pre-wired and ready to ship in minutes.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/balances_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-goldrush-quickstart

**webhook-builder**
  Description: Configure real-time webhooks for wallet events, transfers, and contract interactions.
  Use case: Build a notification system that fires HTTP webhooks when a wallet receives tokens, completes a swap, or interacts with a contract — no polling, pure push delivery.
  Endpoint: POST /v1/webhooks/
  Cost: Per event delivery
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/webhook-builder

### Cross-chain (7 skills)

**address-activity-scanner**
  Description: Discover every chain a wallet address is active on with a single API call.
  Use case: Build the first screen of a multi-chain wallet app — discover which chains a user is active on before fetching balances, saving API credits by only querying active chains.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/address/{walletAddress}/activity/
  Cost: 0.1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +14 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/address-activity-scanner

**cross-chain-activity-report**
  Description: Full cross-chain footprint for any wallet — active chains, combined net worth, unified transaction timeline, and per-chain asset breakdown in one API call.
  Use case: Build a cross-chain analytics page that shows every chain a wallet has ever been active on, their total net worth across all chains, and a unified activity timeline — like DeBank's portfolio but self-hosted.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/address/{walletAddress}/activity/
  Cost: 0.5 + 2.5 + 0.25/tx
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, arbitrum +8 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/cross-chain-activity-report

**cross-chain-address-lookup**
  Description: Resolve and look up the same address across all supported EVM chains at once.
  Use case: Build a cross-chain identity card for any wallet — show which chains they use, when they were last active on each, and link to chain-specific explorers.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/address/{walletAddress}/activity/
  Cost: 0.1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +14 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/cross-chain-address-lookup

**cross-chain-transaction-history**
  Description: Fetch and merge transaction history across multiple chains for a single wallet — great for multichain explorers, unified activity timelines, and tax reporting tools.
  Use case: Build a unified transaction timeline that merges activity from Ethereum, Base, Polygon, and more into a single chronological feed — perfect for tax reporting and portfolio analytics.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/transactions/{walletAddress}/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/cross-chain-transaction-history

**multichain-activity-discovery**
  Description: Scan every supported chain simultaneously to discover which networks a wallet has been active on — single call, 200+ chains. The must-have entry point for any cross-chain app.
  Use case: Detect all chains a user has ever been active on before loading their portfolio — use this as the first call in any multi-chain app to skip querying inactive chains.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/address/{walletAddress}/activity/
  Cost: 0.1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +14 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/multichain-activity-discovery

**multichain-token-aggregator**
  Description: Aggregate all token balances across every chain a wallet is active on — auto-discovers chains then fetches balances in parallel. One function call for a complete cross-chain portfolio.
  Use case: Build a complete cross-chain token dashboard that automatically discovers active chains and aggregates all token holdings — no hard-coded chain list needed.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/address/{walletAddress}/balances/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/multichain-token-aggregator

**multichain-portfolio**
  Description: Unified portfolio view aggregating assets across every GoldRush-supported chain.
  Use case: Build the 'Total Portfolio' view of a cross-chain wallet app — show assets grouped by chain with per-chain totals and a grand total USD net worth.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/address/{walletAddress}/balances/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/multichain-portfolio

### Tokens (19 skills)

**dex-pool-spot-price**
  Description: Fetch real-time spot prices and liquidity for any AMM pool — Uniswap, Aerodrome, PancakeSwap, and more.
  Use case: Build a DEX pool price monitor that shows real-time token0/token1 spot prices and total liquidity for any AMM pool — Uniswap, Aerodrome, PancakeSwap, and more.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/pricing/pool/{contractAddress}/spot_prices/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, gnosis
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/dex-pool-spot-price

**erc20-transfer-history**
  Description: Full paginated ERC-20 transfer history for any wallet and token contract pair.
  Use case: Build a per-token transfer history page showing every time a specific ERC-20 entered or left a wallet — essential for tax tools and token-specific analytics.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/transfers_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/erc20-transfer-history

**pumpfun-token-scanner**
  Description: Monitor pump.fun's bonding curve program on Solana mainnet via GoldRush event logs — fetch the current market cap in USD, SOL held in the bonding curve, percentage progress toward graduation (~$69K), and the top 10 buyers ranked by SOL spent for any pump.fun token mint address. Subscribe to the graduation event stream to know the exact block when a token migrates to Raydium and acquires its first real liquidity pool — essential for launch-tracker UIs and autonomous sniper agents.
  Use case: Build a real-time pump.fun launch tracker that monitors bonding curve progress and fires an alert the moment a token graduates to Raydium with initial liquidity.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/transactions_v3/
  Cost: 2 credits/call
  Level: Advanced
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/pumpfun-token-scanner

**solana-token-holders-snapshot**
  Description: Call `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/tokens/{mint}/token_holders/?page-size=100` to retrieve a ranked list of every wallet holding a given SPL token — returns wallet address, raw balance, USD value, and percentage of total supply for each holder. Paginate through all pages for a complete holder distribution. Use for airdrop snapshot lists, DAO governance voter registries, whale identification, or as input to a holder concentration risk score.
  Use case: Generate a complete SPL token holder distribution snapshot for airdrop eligibility lists, DAO governance registries, or holder concentration risk analysis.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/tokens/{tokenAddress}/token_holders_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-token-holders-snapshot

**solana-token-price-history**
  Description: Fetch OHLCV daily candlestick data for any SPL token via GoldRush's pricing endpoint — specify the mint address and date range (up to 365 days of history for tokens with sufficient liquidity). Each candle returns open, high, low, close price in USD, and 24h trading volume. Use to render price charts with Recharts or Chart.js, run strategy backtests, calculate unrealized P&L for agent-held positions, or power a token screener with momentum signals.
  Use case: Render a Solana token price chart with OHLCV candlestick data and calculate momentum signals for a token screener or strategy backtester.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/pricing/historical_by_addresses_v2/solana-mainnet/USD/{contractAddresses}/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-token-price-history

**solana-token-whale-alert**
  Description: Subscribe to SPL token transfer events for any mint address via GoldRush's real-time activity stream on `solana-mainnet` — filter server-side for transfers above a configurable USD threshold (e.g. >$50K). Each alert payload includes: sender wallet, receiver wallet, token amount, USD value at time of transfer, and the tx signature for on-chain verification. Build a Telegram or Discord whale-alert bot that fires within seconds of a large transfer landing on-chain — under 100 lines of code.
  Use case: Build a Telegram or Discord whale-alert bot that fires within seconds whenever a large SPL token transfer exceeds a configurable USD threshold on Solana.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/transactions_v3/
  Cost: 2 credits/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-token-whale-alert

**spl-token-metadata**
  Description: Call `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/tokens/{mint}/` with any SPL token mint address to retrieve: token name, symbol, decimals, total supply, logo URI, and current USD price as indexed by GoldRush. Works for any SPL token including newly launched pump.fun tokens, wrapped assets, and DeFi governance tokens. This is the mandatory first call for any Solana token analytics page — gives your app complete token context from a single endpoint.
  Use case: Build a Solana token analytics page that loads complete token context — name, symbol, supply, logo, and current price — from a single GoldRush endpoint call.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/pricing/historical_by_addresses_v2/solana-mainnet/USD/{contractAddresses}/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/spl-token-metadata

**spot-price-ticker**
  Description: Live spot prices for thousands of tokens indexed by GoldRush across all chains.
  Use case: Build a live token price ticker or price lookup widget — fetch the current USD price for any ERC-20 by contract address with a single API call.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/pricing/historical_by_addresses_v2/{chainName}/{quoteCurrency}/{contractAddresses}/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +14 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/spot-price-ticker

  Cost: 1 credit/call

  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more

  Cost: 1 credit/page
  Level: Intermediate

  Use case: Render a 30-day price history chart for any ERC-20 token — show daily USD close prices as a line or candlestick chart for DeFi dashboards and portfolio analytics.

  Description: Search any token by name or symbol across all indexed chains — returns address, chain, and logo for instant token lookup UIs.
  Use case: Build a token search input that lets users find any token by name or ticker — returns contract address, chain, and logo for use in swap UIs and token selectors.
  Endpoint: wss://streaming.goldrushdata.com/graphql — searchToken query
  Cost: Free
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, arbitrum, optimism +2 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/token-search

  Use case: Build a token directory that shows name, symbol, decimals, logo, and live USD price for any ERC-20 token in your app — no separate metadata endpoint needed.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/balances_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more

  Description: Real-time stream of ERC-20 transfers for any token or wallet address.
  Use case: Build a live token transfer alert that fires instantly when any ERC-20 token enters or leaves a watched wallet — no polling, pure WebSocket delivery.
  Endpoint: wss://streaming.goldrushdata.com/graphql — walletTxs subscription
  Cost: Streaming subscription
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +10 more

  Use case: Build a token unlock monitor that watches a vesting contract address for Transfer events and alerts when tokens are released, showing recipient, amount, and USD value.

  Cost: 0.01/event
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, arbitrum +1 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/token-unlock-tracker

  Use case: Build a whale alert bot that monitors a specific token contract and fires a notification whenever a transfer exceeds $100k — shows sender, receiver, amount, and USD value.

  Cost: Streaming subscription
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, arbitrum, optimism +1 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/token-whale-alert

### Identity (8 skills)

**airdrop-eligibility-checker**
  Description: Check whether a wallet meets configurable airdrop criteria — transaction count, wallet age, multi-chain activity, specific protocol interactions, and minimum balance thresholds.
  Use case: Build an airdrop checker tool that evaluates wallets against a configurable set of criteria and returns a pass/fail with score breakdown — like the Arbitrum or OP airdrop checker.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/transactions_summary/
  Cost: ~3-5 credits/check
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, arbitrum +1 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/airdrop-eligibility-checker

**ens-resolver**
  Description: Resolve ENS names and reverse-lookup wallet addresses to human-readable identities.
  Use case: Add ENS name support to any wallet input — resolve 'vitalik.eth' to its 0x address before querying balances or transactions, and show ENS names alongside addresses in your UI.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/resolve_address/
  Cost: 0.1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/ens-resolver

**governance-token-snapshot**
  Description: Snapshot all holders of a governance token at a specific block height for voting power calculation, airdrop distribution, or DAO membership verification.
  Use case: Take a holder snapshot for a DAO governance token at a specific block — generate the eligible voter list and voting power distribution for an upcoming proposal.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/tokens/{tokenAddress}/token_holders_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/page
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, gnosis
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/governance-token-snapshot

**nft-gate**
  Description: Gate content or app features based on NFT ownership verified through GoldRush.
  Use case: Lock premium content, Discord roles, or app features behind NFT ownership — check if a connected wallet holds any token from a collection in a single API call.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/collection/{collectionContract}/
  Cost: 0.1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/nft-gate

**onchain-activity-verifier**
  Description: Verify on-chain activity depth with transaction count, wallet age, chains used, and token diversity — build KYC-lite gates, Sybil filters, and proof-of-personhood checks.
  Use case: Build a Sybil-resistance gate for a DeFi airdrop — score wallets by age, total transactions, and chain diversity to filter out bot accounts and fresh wallets.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/transactions_summary/
  Cost: 0.1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +14 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/onchain-activity-verifier

**onchain-credit-widget**
  Description: Embeddable widget that scores any wallet 0–850 based on age, activity depth, asset diversity, and approval hygiene — DeFi's answer to a credit score.
  Use case: Build an embeddable onchain credit score component that lenders, DAOs, and apps can drop in to gate access based on wallet reputation — score computed from age, tx count, chains, net worth, and risky approvals.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/transactions_summary/
  Cost: ~4 credits/score
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, arbitrum
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/onchain-credit-widget

**onchain-resume**
  Description: Generate a shareable public profile page for any wallet — wallet age, chain activity, top assets, NFTs, and DeFi history all in one URL.
  Use case: Build a wallet.eth/0x... profile page that serves as an onchain resume — showing when the wallet was created, which chains it's active on, top token holdings, and NFT collection.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/transactions_summary/
  Cost: ~5 credits total
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, arbitrum +1 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/onchain-resume

**proof-of-onchain-activity**
  Description: Verify wallet activity depth and onchain history as a proof of genuine use.
  Use case: Issue a proof-of-personhood score for any wallet — score wallets on transaction history, wallet age, and multi-chain diversity to filter Sybil accounts from airdrop campaigns.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/address/{walletAddress}/transactions_summary/
  Cost: 0.1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +14 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/proof-of-onchain-activity

### Security (9 skills)

**approval-auditor**
  Description: Scan and identify dangerous ERC-20 token approvals to revoke from any wallet.
  Use case: Build a wallet security scanner that shows all active token approvals, flags the dangerous ones, and calculates the total USD value at risk from unlimited approvals.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/approvals/{walletAddress}/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/approval-auditor

**contract-interaction-history**
  Description: Full history of contract interactions for security forensics and incident response.
  Use case: Build a contract interaction audit trail — show every time a wallet interacted with a specific contract, what events were emitted, and flag any interactions with known exploit contracts.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/events/address/{contractAddress}/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/contract-interaction-history

**smart-contract-interaction-risk**
  Description: Score the risk of interacting with any smart contract based on its onchain history and approvals.
  Use case: Build a pre-transaction risk check that scores any contract before users interact with it — surface honeypot signals, unusual approval patterns, and known exploited contracts.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/approvals/{walletAddress}/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Advanced
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/smart-contract-interaction-risk

**solana-program-verifier**
  Description: Before an agent or user interacts with any unknown Solana program, verify its safety via GoldRush: check if the deployed binary matches a verified source build (OtterSec/Sec3/Otter-verified programs list), look up the program ID against known-malicious contract databases, and fetch its historical instruction volume — high usage over 6+ months signals a battle-tested contract. Returns a `verified` / `unverified` / `malicious` enum plus a link to the audit report if one exists.
  Use case: Build a Solana program safety checker that classifies any program as verified, unverified, or malicious using GoldRush transaction history and known-program lists before user interaction.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/transactions_v3/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-program-verifier

**solana-token-risk-scorer**
  Description: For any SPL token mint address, check 4 critical rug-pull signals via GoldRush: (1) mint authority — can the deployer print unlimited new tokens? (2) freeze authority — can they lock tokens in your wallet? (3) top-10 holder concentration — are 10 wallets holding >80% of supply? (4) liquidity lock — is the Raydium LP locked or can it be withdrawn instantly? Returns a 0–100 composite risk score plus the raw value of each signal so you can explain exactly why a token scored high risk. Wire as a pre-trade guard in any agent pipeline or wallet UI.
  Use case: Build a pre-trade Solana token safety checker that scores rug-pull risk from 0–100 based on mint authority, freeze authority, and holder concentration, blocking dangerous trades automatically.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/solana-mainnet/tokens/{tokenAddress}/token_holders_v2/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: solana
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/solana-token-risk-scorer

**stale-approval-cleaner**
  Description: Surface all active ERC-20 and NFT approvals sorted by risk level — identify unlimited approvals, deprecated protocol spenders, and dead contracts that should be revoked.
  Use case: Build a wallet security dashboard that shows every active token approval grouped by risk (critical/high/medium/safe), with the dollar value at risk and a direct Etherscan revoke link for each.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/approvals/{walletAddress}/
  Cost: 2 credits/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, bsc, polygon, optimism, arbitrum +1 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/stale-approval-cleaner

**token-approval-risk-scanner**
  Description: Scan all active ERC-20 and NFT approvals for a wallet and score each by risk level — identify dangerous unlimited approvals, deprecated protocols, and known exploited contracts.
  Use case: Build a comprehensive approval risk report for any wallet — categorize every approval as low/medium/high risk, sum up total value at risk, and recommend which to revoke.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/approvals/{walletAddress}/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Intermediate
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/token-approval-risk-scanner

**token-risk-analyzer**
  Description: Score tokens for rug-pull signals, ownership concentration, and LP lock status.
  Use case: Build a token safety checker that scores any ERC-20 for rug-pull risk — combine approval data, price history volatility, and holder concentration into a risk score.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/approvals/{walletAddress}/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Advanced
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/token-risk-analyzer

**transaction-decoded-receipt**
  Description: Fetch a fully decoded transaction receipt including internal transfers, decoded log events, ERC-20/NFT movements, and gas analytics — the core of any transaction detail page.
  Use case: Build a transaction detail page that shows every token transfer, internal call, and decoded event in a human-readable format — like Etherscan's transaction view but for your own app.
  Endpoint: GET /v1/{chainName}/transaction_v2/{txHash}/
  Cost: 1 credit/call
  Level: Beginner
  Chains: ethereum, base, polygon, bsc, optimism, arbitrum +13 more
  URL: https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/transaction-decoded-receipt

## How to use these skills
Each skill page at https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/{slug} contains:
- A working TypeScript/JavaScript code snippet using @covalenthq/client-sdk
- The GoldRush API endpoint(s) used
- Supported chains
- Complexity level (beginner / intermediate / advanced)
- Use case description
- Key parameters and response fields
- Credit cost estimate

## Quick start
```typescript
import { GoldRushClient } from "@covalenthq/client-sdk";
const client = new GoldRushClient("YOUR_API_KEY");

// Get all token balances for a wallet
const resp = await client.BalanceService.getTokenBalancesForWalletAddress(
  "eth-mainnet",
  "0xwalletAddress"
);
if (resp.error) throw new Error(resp.error_message ?? "API error");
const items = resp.data?.items ?? [];
```

Get a free API key: https://goldrush.dev
Full SDK docs: https://goldrush.dev/docs/unified-api/sdk/
GoldRush Kit (React components): https://goldrush.dev/docs/goldrush-kit/
